mnemonics.title: IPC System Call Pattern
mnemonics.content: Get-Control-Operate Pattern: All three use xxxget() to create/access, xxxctl() to control, and specific operations (msgsnd/msgrcv, semop, memory access)

mnemonics.title: Semaphore Operations
mnemonics.content: Positive-Negative-Zero: Positive values increment (V operation), negative values decrement (P operation), zero waits for value to become zero

mnemonics.title: IPC Removal
mnemonics.content: RMID Removes: Use IPC_RMID with xxxctl() functions to remove IPC objects (msgctl, semctl, shmctl)
